name: asmtest
description: Node.js binding for the asm-test assembly unit-testing framework
//license: asm-test is MIT, but the bundled native payload conveys Unicorn + Keystone (GPL-2.0) and Capstone (BSD-3-Clause), so the package as distributed is effectively GPL-2.0. See native/<plat>/THIRD-PARTY-LICENSES.
//: Packaging (see docs/packaging.md): the published package exposes the reusable library module (asmtest.js, `main`); conformance.js is the dev test runner and is NOT shipped. `make node-package` stages the prebuilt libasmtest_emu into native/<plat>/ from build/dist/native/ before `npm pack`, and `files` ships it. A real release adds per-platform prebuilds (prebuildify).
